metadata.name: Prepare for Clinical Trial Database Lock

description: A data manager is preparing for the final database lock of a completed clinical trial.

nodes.task_description: Run a final report of all open data queries in the EDC system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a report showing 5 remaining open queries.

nodes.task_description: Work with the clinical monitoring team to ensure all open queries are resolved and closed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows up with CRAs until all queries are closed.

nodes.task_description: Perform the final data reconciliation between the clinical and safety databases.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a reconciliation and confirms there are no discrepancies in adverse event reporting.

nodes.task_description: Execute the database lock procedure in the EDC system, making the data read-only.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locks the database and generates an audit trail of the action.
